response.overview: Sofia, after years of searching for her mother, wakes up as she does on any day from a recurring nightmare. She systematically investigates and spies on a possible human trafficking and illegal prostitution ring operating in an abandoned place, with signs that her mother is inside. When she infiltrates it, she not only discovers that her mother works there, but also that her father is the one who owns everything. After seeing what her father is really like and the way he treats her mother, she decides to take revenge—a decision that leads her to wake up in the very same place where the story began.
response.tagline: El tiempo lo revela todo. Lo mejor y lo peor.
response.title: Caracola
